caption: A man with blonde hair, wearing a black t-shirt, appears in a small overlay window in the lower-left corner of the scene, reacting with an open-mouthed, surprised expression. The main view displays a stylized, glowing green and blue digital environment. A large, metallic grey block featuring a stylized "U1" logo stands centrally. As the sequence progresses, the block erupts in a burst of bright yellow and white light, followed by a momentary glitch effect with red and blue streaks across the screen. The scene then shifts to a close-up of the "U1" logo against a dark, smoky purple and blue background with sparkling particles. The text "90+ ZERO CHILL PLAYER" is visible in white lettering across the middle of the screen in the first two frames, and the word "BACK" appears next to a circular icon at the bottom center in the final frame.
